name: Content Placeholder 2
text: AIRA is a web-based Artificial Intelligence Requirement Analyzer that helps users generate Software Requirements Specification documents, create UML diagrams, analyze SRS ambiguity, and describe uploaded UML images in a structured way.

name: Title 1
text: Project Objectives
textPreview: Project Objectives

name: Content Placeholder 2
text:
Generate structured SRS documents from project names, descriptions, uploaded files, or diagrams.
Produce editable UML diagrams and downloadable diagram outputs.
Analyze SRS documents for ambiguity and requirement quality.
Describe UML images with diagram-specific interpretation.
Provide secure user accounts, history, pricing plans, and admin privileges.

text: Problem Statement
textPreview: Problem Statement

name: Content Placeholder 2
text: Students and developers often face difficulty converting project ideas into complete SRS documents and professional UML diagrams. Manual writing can miss requirements, introduce ambiguity, and require repeated formatting work.

name: Title 1
text: Proposed Solution
textPreview: Proposed Solution

name: Content Placeholder 2
text: AIRA provides one integrated platform where users can generate SRS documents, create UML diagrams, analyze ambiguities, describe UML images, save history, and download outputs in usable formats. The system also supports premium access and admin-level unrestricted usage.

name: Title 1
text: Functional Requirements
textPreview: Functional Requirements

name: Content Placeholder 2
text:
The system shall allow users to sign up and log in securely.
The system shall generate SRS documents based on user input or uploaded files.
The system shall generate UML diagrams from SRS or system descriptions.
The system shall analyze SRS ambiguity and provide recommendations.
The system shall describe uploaded UML diagram images.
The system shall allow users to download results and view history.
textPreview: The system shall allow users to sign up and log in securely. | The system shall generate SRS documents based on user input or uploaded fi...

textPreview: Department of Computer Science & Information Technology, University of Chakwal

text:
Main actors: User and Admin.
User functions: sign up, log in, generate SRS, generate UML, upload UML image, check ambiguity, view history, and download output.
Admin functions: manage users and access premium features without usage limits.

name: Title 1
text: Tools & Technologies
textPreview: Tools & Technologies

name: Rectangle 9
text: Department of Computer Science & Information Technology, University of Chakwal
textPreview: Department of Computer Science & Information Technology, University of Chakwal

text:
Frontend: HTML, CSS, JavaScript
Backend: Node.js, Express.js, Python AI modules
Database: MySQL with MySQL Workbench
AI/ML: scikit-learn, joblib, TF-IDF, rule-based ambiguity detection
OCR/Vision: OpenCV, Tesseract OCR, Pillow
Documents: PDF.js, DOCX extraction, PDF/DOC/TXT exports
External/Optional: Gemini API, OpenRouter fallback, PlantUML/Kroki rendering
